meta.title: About Rent With Heldy | South Florida Car Rentals
meta.description: Meet Rent With Heldy — a family-owned South Florida car rental company built around one idea: renting a car should feel easy. 1,400+ five-star reviews, real people to help.

hero.title: A family-owned car rental built around easy
hero.subtitle: Rent With Heldy is a family-owned South Florida car rental company built around one simple idea: renting a car should feel easy. We help guests coordinate the right vehicle, the easiest pickup, and the support they need throughout the trip.

trusted.title: 1,400+ Five-Star Reviews
trusted.description: An All-Star Host on Turo, earned trip after trip with clean cars and clear communication.

quality.title: Meticulously Maintained
quality.description: Every vehicle is professionally cleaned, detailed, and inspected before each rental — economy through newer premium options.

local.title: Family-Owned & Local
local.description: A South Florida family that coordinates your pickup personally — hotel, airport, or cruise port.

story.heading: Our Story
story.p1: We're a family-owned car rental based in South Florida, built around a simple belief: renting a car should feel easy, personal, and genuinely helpful. We treat every renter like a guest — not a transaction.
story.p2: Instead of counters, lines, and upsells, we bring the experience to you. We coordinate the right vehicle for your trip, the easiest pickup — hotel, airport, cruise port, or body shop — and contactless access so you can get moving on your schedule. There's always a real person to reach when you need help.
story.p3: Our fleet runs from practical economy cars to newer premium options, and every vehicle is professionally cleaned, detailed, and inspected before each rental. It's the reason we've earned 1,400+ five-star reviews and All-Star Host status across South Florida.

getInTouch.heading: Get in Touch
getInTouch.phoneNote: Call or text, 7 days a week
getInTouch.emailNote: We'll reply as soon as possible

miamiDade.title: Miami-Dade County
miamiDade.description: Miami Beach, Downtown Miami, Coral Gables, Aventura, and surrounding areas

broward.title: Broward County
broward.description: Fort Lauderdale, Hollywood, Pompano Beach, Davie, and surrounding areas

meta.title: Privacy Policy | Rent With Heldy
meta.description: How Rent With Heldy collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you book a car rental in Fort Lauderdale, Miami, or South Florida.

overview.heading: Overview
overview.body: Rent With Heldy ("we", "us") respects your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect when you visit rentwithheldy.com or book a vehicle with us, how we use it, and the choices you have.

booking.desc: name, email, phone, and trip dates submitted through our booking widget.

verification.desc: required by our booking platform (driver's license, payment method) to complete a reservation.

communication.desc: messages, calls, and texts you send us about your reservation.

siteUsage.desc: basic analytics like pages visited and device type, used to improve the site.

use.heading: How we use your information
items: To process and manage your rental reservation.
To coordinate pickup, return, and support during your trip.
To respond to questions and provide customer service.
To improve the website and our service quality.
To comply with legal and tax obligations.

sharing.heading: Sharing of information
sharing.body: We do not sell your personal information. We share information only with the booking and payment platforms required to complete your reservation, and with service providers strictly as needed to operate the rental (for example, insurance verification).

cookies.heading: Cookies and analytics
cookies.body: We use minimal cookies for site functionality and aggregated analytics. You can control cookies through your browser settings.

choices.heading: Your choices
choices.text: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal information by contacting us at

meta.title: Terms of Service | Rent With Heldy
meta.description: Terms governing reservations, rentals, and use of the Rent With Heldy website and car rental service in Fort Lauderdale, Miami, and South Florida.

acceptance.heading: Acceptance of terms
acceptance.body: By accessing rentwithheldy.com or booking a vehicle with Rent With Heldy, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the site or book a vehicle.

reservations.heading: Reservations
reservations.body: Reservations are made through our booking platform. The terms, cancellation policies, insurance requirements, and protection plans of that platform apply to every booking in addition to these terms. You are responsible for reviewing them at checkout.

eligibility.heading: Driver eligibility
items: Renters must be at least 21 (some vehicles require 25+).
A valid driver's license is required at pickup.
Only authorized drivers listed on the reservation may operate the vehicle.
The vehicle may not be used for illegal activity, racing, or off-road driving.

vehicleUse.heading: Vehicle use and condition
vehicleUse.body: You agree to return the vehicle in the same condition as received, normal wear excepted. Damage, excessive cleaning needs, unauthorized smoking, or pet hair beyond reasonable use may incur fees per the booking platform's policies.

cancellations.heading: Cancellations and changes
cancellations.body: Cancellation and change policies are governed by the booking platform you reserved through. We do our best to accommodate reasonable changes — message us as early as possible.

liability.heading: Liability
liability.body: Rent With Heldy is not liable for personal items left in the vehicle, third-party traffic violations, tolls, or charges incurred during your rental. Insurance and protection plans are handled through the booking platform.

website.heading: Website use
website.body: The content on this site is provided for informational purposes. We may update vehicles, pricing, and availability at any time. Live booking availability and pricing in the booking widget takes precedence over any information shown elsewhere on the site.

governingLaw.heading: Governing law
governingLaw.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the State of Florida, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.text: Questions about these terms? Reach us at

englishNotice.heading: Legal Information
englishNotice.body: The following legal information is provided in English to preserve its original legal meaning. If you need assistance understanding any part of it, our team will be happy to help.
